footer.tagline: The most affordable and easiest way to search and post jobs in Mizoram.

home.hero_subtitle: Find the latest jobs easily. Search listings across different districts of Mizoram.
home.search_placeholder: Search by job title, location, or company...

about.title: About Hnaruak Mizoram
about.description: Hnaruak Mizoram is a platform built to consolidate all job vacancies in Mizoram in one easy-to-search place. By solving the challenges faced in job discovery, we aim to bridge the gap between job seekers and employers, with support for the Mizo language.
about.mission_desc: To connect job seekers and employers seamlessly. Employers can post vacancies affordably, and job seekers can search for free without registration.
about.why_us_1: English & Mizo Support: Easy to navigate in your preferred language.
about.why_us_2: Self-Serve Payment: Post jobs in minutes via Razorpay integration.
about.why_us_3: Simple & Direct: Search for jobs directly without creating an account.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: If you have any questions or issues, feel free to reach out using the contact information below.
contact.success_msg: Your message has been sent. We will get back to you soon.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How we collect, use, and protect your personal data — in compliance with India's Digital Personal Data Protection Act (DPDPA), 2023.
privacy.section_1_desc: Employers: We collect your name, email address, phone number, company address, and company logo when you register an account. Job Seekers: We automatically collect search queries, device IP address, and browser type via cookies or search index logging (e.g., Algolia). No personal registration data is required from job seekers.
privacy.section_2_desc: Data is collected solely to operate the job board, verify employer listings, prevent fraud and abuse, and process any platform-related transactions. We do not use your data for any purpose beyond what is necessary to provide our services.
privacy.section_3_desc: Your data is shared only with trusted third-party service providers essential to operating our platform. This includes Algolia (for search index caching), as well as our secure hosting and email delivery infrastructure. We do not sell your data to advertisers or unrelated third parties.
privacy.section_4_desc: In accordance with the Digital Personal Data Protection Act (DPDPA) 2023, you — as a Data Principal — hold the following rights: (a) Right of Access: You may request a summary of your personal data being processed. (b) Right to Correction: You may request correction of inaccurate or incomplete information. (c) Right to Erasure: You may request deletion of your personal data, subject to any legal retention obligations.
privacy.section_5_desc: When an employer deletes their account, all associated job listings are hidden from public view. However, certain records may be retained in our database as required for transaction history, legal compliance, or fraud prevention purposes.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: This Terms of Service is a binding contract between Hnaruak Mizoram and its users (employers and job seekers). By using this platform, you agree to the following terms.
terms.section_1_desc: Job seekers are never charged to search or apply for jobs on this platform. All job search and application features are completely free of charge.
terms.section_2_desc: Hnaruak Mizoram is a job aggregator and advertising venue. We do not guarantee employment, interviews, or responses from employers. All hiring decisions are made solely by the respective employers.
terms.section_3_desc: Users agree to use the "Report" feature in good faith and solely for its intended purpose. The Report feature must not be used to harass, target, or make false claims against employers.
terms.section_4_desc: Any disagreements or problems arising between job seekers and employers are not the responsibility of the website owner. The platform will not intervene in or take any action regarding such disputes.
terms.section_5_desc: Employers must provide accurate and verifiable business credentials when registering, including an active phone number, a valid email address, and a registered business address. Providing false information may result in account suspension.
terms.section_6_desc: The publication of fraudulent, misleading, duplicate, or discriminatory job postings is strictly prohibited. This includes any violation of the Equal Remuneration Act or applicable labour laws. Employers may not contest or lodge complaints against any enforcement actions taken by the platform under this policy.
terms.section_7_desc: Posting a job on Hnaruak Mizoram is completely free of charge. There are no subscription fees or hidden charges for employers.
terms.section_8_desc: Employers warrant that they hold all necessary rights and licences to publish any PDF circulars uploaded to the platform. All uploaded files must be free from malware, viruses, defamatory content, and illegal material. The platform reserves the right to remove any file that violates this policy.
terms.section_9_desc: Any disagreements or problems arising between employers and job seekers are not the responsibility of the website owner. The platform will not intervene in or take any action regarding such disputes.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.subtitle: Details on payment refunds.
refund.section_1_desc: Once a job listing goes live, payments are non-refundable.
refund.section_2_desc: Payments are processed securely via Razorpay. Listings will not go live without successful payment confirmation.
refund.section_3_desc: If you experience technical issues where a payment was debited but the job did not go live, please contact us. We will resolve it within 24 hours.

jobs.no_jobs: No job vacancies found at the moment.
jobs.not_found: The job listing you are looking for was not found or has expired.
jobs.pdf_upload_hint: Only PDF files under 5MB are allowed

report.title: Report Employer
report.success_msg: Your report has been submitted. We will review it shortly.

dashboard.delete_account_warn: Are you sure you want to delete your account? All active listings will be deleted as well.
